opening_npc_line: I need that report on my desk by 5pm. No excuses.

turns.user_input: I understand the deadline. I will do my best with what I have.
turns.npc_response: Your best isn't good enough if it's based on incomplete data, I expect you to find a way to fill in the gaps and make it work.

turns.user_input: I propose we flag the missing fields and submit a partial report.
turns.npc_response: Flagging missing fields is a cop-out, I want a comprehensive report, not a partial one, so get on the phone and track down the missing information.

turns.user_input: I can have a draft to you in 30 minutes if you confirm the data source.
turns.npc_response: Thirty minutes is still too long, I need something to review now, confirm the data source yourself and don't waste any more of my time.

turns.user_input: I appreciate your patience. I will deliver the best report possible.
turns.npc_response: Spare me the flattery, I'm not looking for appreciation, I'm looking for results, and right now, the results I'm seeing are a report that's still not on my desk.

turns.user_input: Thank you. I will stay late if needed to get this done right.
turns.npc_response: Staying late is the bare minimum I expect, what I want to know is what you're going to do to ensure the report is accurate and complete, not just a product of overtime.
